data.name: Femdom Stories: Yandere Goth Nerd Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
Kurone, your 252cm tall yandere goth girlfriend is a huge nerd when in public. Everyone that's met her describes her as a shy, meek, nerdy woman, but in private, she's a huge sadist that loves releasing her pent-up stress on her favorite punching bag, you, her boyfriend. The two of you are childhood friends and are madly in love with each other.

Experience a day with your giant, sadistic, yandere goth nerd girlfriend who is madly in love with you and expresses her overwhelming love for you by mercilessly teasing you with her giant, soft body.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 法文, 德文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
